name: Toyo Ink SC Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Toyo Ink SC Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in colorants and functional materials, polymers and coatings, printing and information, and packaging materials related businesses in Japan, China, and internationally. The company's colorants and functional materials include general purpose pigments, functional and pigment dispersions, plastic colorants, and color filter materials; and polymers and coatings comprise coating materials, adhesives, laminating adhesives, hot-melt adhesives, water-based resins, can and functional hard coatings, medical products, and natural extracts, as well as electronic materials, adhesives tapes and films, and marking films. Its printing and information product include offset, ultraviolet curable, screen printing, and inkjet inks; and packaging materials comprise gravure inks and flexo inks, as well as water-based solvents for gravure packaging. The company also provides printing materials and machinery; prepress systems; gravure cylinders; ink-jet materials; and others. Toyo Ink SC Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1896 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
